reason: The current meta description is generic; adding specific service names (lip blushing, powder brows) and a CTA improves search relevance for high-intent Gold Coast queries.
The FAQ states free shipping over $100 but the site-wide announcement banner on every page says 'Free Shipping Over $80' — this corrects the FAQ to match the banner.
Adding 'on the Gold Coast' to the hero subheading reinforces local relevance for search without changing tone.
